case_title: SHARRUSS PORTFOLIO MANAGEMENT VS. JOSEPHINE RELOS ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF WENDY M. HARRIS IN SUPPORT OF PLAINTIFFS REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT COURT JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100070355) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHARRUSS PORTFOLIO MANAGEMENT
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAY-21-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION OF MIA ADAMSON IN SUPPORT OF PLAINTIFFS REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT COURT JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100070355) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHARRUSS PORTFOLIO MANAGEMENT
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100070355) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY, (TRANSACTION ID # 100070355): HARRIS, WENDY M. SUBSTITUTED FOR GORDON, AMY LOUISE AS ATTORNEY FOR SHARRUSS PORTFOLIO MANAGEMENT
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-21-2019 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $350.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 100070355) AS TO DEFENDANT RELOS, JOSEPHINE

RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANTS PURSUANT TO LOCAL RULE 3.0 C; DECLARATION OF WENDY HARRIS IN SUPPORT THEREOF (TRANSACTION ID # 100070355) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHARRUSS PORTFOLIO MANAGEMENT AS TO DEFENDANT RELOS, JOSEPHINE

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHARRUSS PORTFOLIO MANAGEMENT AS TO DEFENDANT RELOS, JOSEPHINE DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-11-2019

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100070355), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHARRUSS PORTFOLIO MANAGEMENT SERVED OCT-07-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE OCT-08-2018 AS TO DEFENDANT RELOS, JOSEPHINE

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHARRUSS PORTFOLIO MANAGEMENT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RELOS, JOSEPHINE $3,100.00 PRINCIPAL, $630.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $1,055.66 INTEREST, $350.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,135.66, SEE SCANNED DOC
